references.title: UI Skills — Swiss Design Frameworks
references.notes: Swiss design + Addy Osmani frameworks. Primary source for hardening rubrics in Phase 8.

references.title: Addy Osmani — Learning Patterns
references.notes: Design patterns for modern web apps. Referenced for component architecture decisions.

references.title: Radix UI Primitives
references.notes: Unstyled, accessible component primitives underpinning HDS interactive components.

references.title: Anthropic Claude API Docs
references.notes: Primary reference for Claude API, vision capabilities, and prompt caching used in the autonomous build pipeline.

references.title: Figma Plugin API
references.notes: Official Figma plugin API reference. Used for HDS bridge plugin development.

references.title: Web Vitals
references.notes: LCP, CLS, INP baselines. CI gate added in Phase 12 (12o-perf-web-vitals-budget).
